overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player character walks along wet streets reflecting colorful holographic advertisements, crosses intersections with other pedestrians, and explores a downtown area with towering skyscrapers and palm-lined sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown street with holographic advertisements

events.description: camera moves past the digital kiosk and begins approaching the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk past a digital advertising kiosk and magazine stand, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: person leaning against the railing near the magazine stand

entered.detail: illuminated vertical kiosk displaying colorful anime-style character advertisement
massive building-sized holographic display showing a green-tinted face
rack with publications and a blue trash bin beside it
large building with illuminated pink signage reading PASSION
green metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet neon-lit street at night, with a digital advertising kiosk prominently displayed on the left. The camera moves forward past a magazine stand on the right, approaching a large building featuring a massive green holographic face display. The street is relatively empty with sparse pedestrian activity and light vehicle traffic on the wet asphalt.

events.description: steps onto the yellow-striped crosswalk and begins crossing the street
enters a narrower street passage with an overpass bridge overhead

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk with other pedestrians, moving toward the overpass

notable_agents.action: man in dark clothing crossing the street in the same direction
person in bright pink shirt walking across the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black striped pattern
elevated highway or monorail track crossing over the street
tall building with illuminated windows and teal lighting
staircase leading up to the overpass or building entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses a wide intersection via a yellow-striped crosswalk, joining other pedestrians including a person in a bright pink shirt. The environment transitions from the open street to a more enclosed area beneath an overpass bridge, with a glass skyscraper rising in the background and concrete stairs visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined sidewalk next to modern commercial buildings

events.description: passes a corner with scattered trash and debris next to a large structural column

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing modern glass buildings

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: tall palm tree trunk with textured bark in a concrete planter
contemporary building with large illuminated glass windows and horizontal lines
massive cylindrical structural support for the overpass
scattered garbage bags and discarded items near the column base

segments.scene_description: Walking along a palm tree-lined sidewalk next to modern glass buildings, the camera passes a large concrete column with scattered trash at its base. The street remains wet and reflective, with sparse pedestrian traffic and occasional vehicles passing on the road to the left. The green holographic billboard remains visible in the distance behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level plaza with elevated walkways and a distinctive red tree

events.description: enters an open plaza area featuring a large red-leaved tree and complex ramp structures
camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza and looking up at the towering buildings, observing the architecture

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking through the plaza

entered.detail: distinctive tree with bright red foliage in a raised planter
curved elevated roadway or walkway with red neon trim
immense building facade covered in multiple layers of holographic billboards and advertisements
tall vertical digital display showing various advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a spacious plaza dominated by a striking red-leaved tree and complex multi-level architecture with elevated ramps. The camera moves through this area, passing other pedestrians, then tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers completely covered in massive holographic advertisements and neon signage, showcasing the vertical density of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic city, moving from a rain-slicked street into a dense, vertically towering urban plaza. It begins by gliding past a digital kiosk and a magazine stand on wet asphalt, approaching a massive green holographic face that looms over the road. As the camera crosses a yellow-striped intersection alongside other pedestrians, the open street transitions into a more enclosed space beneath a concrete overpass bridge with a glass skyscraper rising in the background. The path then shifts toward a palm tree-lined sidewalk, passing a concrete column and reflective pavement while the green hologram recedes into the distance. Finally, the movement enters a spacious plaza featuring a striking red-leaved tree and elevated ramps, before tilting upward to reveal a skyline of skyscrapers completely enveloped in massive holographic advertisements and neon signage.
